title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping playbook for achieving $1M ARR in 117 days and scaling to $10M with no funding. The interview covers growth strategies including product-led growth, SEO, warm outbound, pricing experimentation, churn reduction, and decision-making frameworks for capital raises and team structure.
